creator: eric_zumwalt@leasedimensions.com
text:
When installing php56-extensions I receive this error.

This is running on Freebsd 11.

Building for net-snmp-5.7.3_16
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/snmplib
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/agent
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/agent/helpers
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/agent/mibgroup
/bin/sh ../libtool --mode=link cc -DNETSNMP_ENABLE_IPV6 -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/local/include -I/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c99 -Ufreebsd11 -Dfreebsd11=freebsd11  -DHAS_FPSETMASK -DHAS_FLOATINGPOINT_H -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fstack-protector -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.20/mach/CORE -o snmpd snmpd.lo -L/usr/lib -lm -lkvm -ldevstat -L/lib -L/usr/local/lib -lcrypto libnetsnmpagent.la libnetsnmpmibs.la ../snmplib/libnetsnmp.la -lelf -lpkg -lssp_nonshared -Wl,-R/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.20/mach/CORE  -lpkg
libtool: link: cc -DNETSNMP_ENABLE_IPV6 -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -I/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c99 -Ufreebsd11 -Dfreebsd11=freebsd11 -DHAS_FPSETMASK -DHAS_FLOATINGPOINT_H -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fstack-protector -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.20/mach/CORE -o .libs/snmpd .libs/snmpd.o -Wl,-R/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.20/mach/CORE  -L/usr/lib -L/lib -L/usr/local/lib ./.libs/libnetsnmpagent.so -L/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.20/mach/CORE ./.libs/libnetsnmpmibs.so /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/agent/.libs/libnetsnmpagent.so /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/snmplib/.libs/libnetsnmp.so ../snmplib/.libs/libnetsnmp.so -lwrap -lperl -lpthread -lcrypt -lutil -lelf -lpkg -lssp_nonshared -lm -lkvm -ldevstat -lcrypto  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
/usr/local/lib/libssl.so.8: undefined reference to `BIO_dgram_is_sctp'
/usr/local/lib/libssl.so.8: undefined reference to `BIO_dgram_sctp_wait_for_dry'
/usr/local/lib/libssl.so.8: undefined reference to `BIO_dgram_sctp_msg_waiting'
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[9]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/agent
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[8]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[7]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[6]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[5]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[4]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/php56-snmp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/php56-snmp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/php56-extensions
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/php56-extensions
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/php56-extensions

Thanks.
